[Bart Banning](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/bart-banning/index.html). In the world of logistics, everything revolves around costs and efficiency. In times when transport costs will continue to rise, it is important to look at how logistics companies can improve productivity in the chains together with their customers. Using AI gives companies the opportunity to do this; not as an end in itself, but as a means. It is not without reason that the theme of AI was central during the 25th edition of the Top 100 Logistics Service Providers earlier this year.

metadata.source_title: Quality as a goal, AI as a means

text: In the world of logistics, everything revolves around costs and efficiency. In times when transport costs will continue to rise, it is important to look at how logistics companies can improve productivity in the chains together with their customers. Using AI gives companies the opportunity to do this; not as an end in itself, but as a means. It is not without reason that the theme of AI was central during the 25th edition of the Top 100 Logistics Service Providers earlier this year. Everyone is talking about AI, but how are the opportunities of AI seen from the perspective of companies in the logistics sector?

metadata.source_title: Quality as a goal, AI as a means

text: The added value of AI can be great for companies that have gained the first serious experiences. It contributes to solving major challenges faced by the sector such as cost increases, emission reduction, labor market and lack of space. The challenge is to use the existing capacity of people and square meters in a smarter way. AI is the next phase in the digital route, and is not a hype but a topic that will determine the progress of every logistics company in the coming years.

text: Time savings for employees, for example, allowing them to focus more on quality. Quality is the goal, and AI the means. It is important to start small, with the low-hanging fruit. VTS starts with one process and expands from there. Another tip is to create support among employees.

metadata.source_title: Quality as a goal, AI as a means

text:
Quality is the goal, and AI the means. It is important to start small, with the low-hanging fruit. VTS starts with one process and expands from there. Another tip is to create support among employees. By this, VTS refers to the importance of everyone coming up with ideas for process improvements, after which they can look at the solution together. [Look further for the entire conversation between Bart Banning and Nick Lenting](https://www.logistiek.nl/204200/vts-stelt-quality-als-doelen-met-ai-als-middel-video)
Read more in the transport and logistics sector.

After a difficult year, in which international trade declined due to a rapid reduction of excess inventories, the transport sector has started a cautious recovery. metadata.source_title: Quality as a goal, AI as a means

text:
After a difficult year, in which international trade declined due to a rapid reduction of excess inventories, the transport sector has started a cautious recovery. At the beginning of 2024, freight volumes increased in both container shipping and aviation. Thanks to the improving economic growth, the sector can recover further. However, the recovery is being held back by lower demand for building materials. In the meantime, road transport will have to deal with a pile-up of environmental regulations in the coming years.
